hero.eyebrow: intro week · 31 aug to 4 sep · HvA Amsterdam
hero.subPre: Your first week at the HvA. Where your studies begin, and where you
hero.subPost: . Boot in. Fly into the SIT core.

01.desc: The Hub on the 6th opens up. Walk in, grab your starter pack and sign up with the QR. No fixed programme, just getting to know each other.

02.desc: The big afternoon, on the day all first-years are free. The finish of the campus walk at the Hub: Mario Kart and Smash bracket on the Switch, the committee market, snacks and joining up.

03.desc: Free pizza while senior students show their studies and own side projects. So you see what you will be building yourself soon.

04.desc: Bring your laptop. Together we set up a strong setup with free licenses via GitHub Education and JetBrains, plus the tools to start your studies strong.

05.desc: Last walk-in of the week. Hang out, ask your questions and get a preview of the Aloha party in week 2.

01.desc: Your first hands-on event. In one day you build something real with AI4HvA, building on our AI hackathon experience. The exact date in week 2 follows.

02.desc: The intro party at Aloha Amsterdam next to Central Station. Bowling, lasergaming, glow minigolf, karaoke and VR. You can sign up per mentor group so nobody comes alone. Date in week 2 follows.

01.title: Starter pack
01.body: Stickers, goodies and the HBO-ICT survival guide with everything you need.

02.title: Free dev tools
02.body: GitHub Education, JetBrains and more. At Study with SIT we set them up on your laptop together.

03.title: Find your way at HvA
03.body: Brightspace, schedules, the HvA apps and the student rep family tree. You know your way right away.

04.title: A crew from day 1
04.body: The board, {commissies} committees and senior students. You are never alone in your first week.
